description: The Vollaro clan is a Neapolitan Camorra clan operating in the area east of Naples, specifically in Portici and San Sebastiano al Vesuvio. Founded in the mid-1970s by Luigi Vollaro, it engaged in racketeering, drug trafficking, extortion, and other crimes. The clan fought internal wars and sided with the Alfieri clan against the Nuova Camorra Organizzata. Despite the arrest of its founder and subsequent leadership, the clan remains active.
